resources.string: Export words and preferences to a zip file

All words and preferences will be exported into a zip file. This file can be used to restore your data when the app (with the version the same as current version) is installed for the first time. Please note: media files are not included in the export and should be manually copied to the new storage environment, keeping the directory structure unchanged.
Player state and subtitle ui related settings

SituLearner is designed to build a strong connection between vocabulary and context. By using authentic example sentences as its core material, the app offers features such as vocabulary recommendations, echoing, and quizzes, **aiming to immerse learners in language environments that are vivid, intuitive, and engaging**. Users will need to provide their own audio/video files and corresponding subtitle files. For more details, please visit the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/coda251/situlearner). This project is open-sourced under the AGPL-3.0 license. Finally, sincere thanks go to the online dictionary services and other open-source libraries used in this app. Happy learning:)
